title: feat: allowlist Catniti + Bakhshi7889 for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds Catniti and Bakhshi7889 to COMMUNITY_MODEL_ALLOWED_GITHUB_IDS
- Both requested access in the community-models Discord thread

gist.headline: Keys to the model garden
gist.blurb: Catniti and Bakhshi7889 just got access to the community models allowlist. Time to see what new AI flavors they plant in the hive.
gist.summary: Added GitHub users Catniti and Bakhshi7889 to the community models allowlist.
gist.impact: These two creators can now deploy and share their custom models with the rest of the community via the API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming two new friends into a digital garden, handing them glowing seeds to plant their own models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, handing glowing digital seeds to two friendly pixel avatars in a digital garden. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Polly and the avatars are rendered with chunky retro sprites, surrounded by code-plants sprouting from the soil. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
